case_title: TESFAI, YOHANNES VS HEARNE, JENNIFER C.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $980.87 FILED BY TESFAI, YOHANNES AS TO DEFENDANT HEARNE, JENNIFER C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TESFAI, YOHANNES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARNE, JENNIFER C. $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $620.00, COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE ON BOTH PART: 75% CONTRIBU- TORY TO DEFT AND 25% TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HEARNE, JENNIFER C.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23140, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-07-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TESFAI, YOHANNES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HEARNE, JENNIFER C. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $520.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23140 ON 5-25-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO JENNIFER HEARNE RETURNED SIGNED.
